title: Emerald Gear
description: This fabric mod adds emerald armor, tools, weapons
body:
# Emerald Gear

Emerald Gear is my first Minecraft mod and it adds a brand-new emerald-based gear set to the game!
The mod is currently in development, but it’s fully playable and already adds some fun features.
#

## ✨ Features

### 🟢 Emerald Armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)

### 🗡️ Emerald Tools & Weapons

### 💚 Villager Discounts
#

### Villagers give discounts when:

You wear a piece of emerald armor

You wear a full emerald armor set

You hold an emerald-based item

Discounts use the vanilla villager gossip system, similar to Hero of the Village
#

## ⚠️ Notice

This mod is still in development

Multiplayer support is limited for now

Bugs or balance issues may exist — feedback is appreciated!
#

## 📦 Compatibility

### Minecraft Version: 1.21.11

### Loader: [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)

### Requires: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?c=release&g=1.21.11)
#

## 📜 License

[All Rights Reserved (ARR)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PrimzalHorizon/emeraldgear-1.21.11-fabric/refs/heads/main/LICENSE.txt)
#

## 🧑‍💻 About

This is the first mod I’ve ever made, built while learning Fabric modding.
More updates and improvements are planned!
[Source code](https://github.com/PrimzalHorizon/emeraldgear-1.21.11-fabric)
